SQLLite.SQL: ( SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "Type" , AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , P.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO CRED' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , 'CO CRED' AS "Type" , AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , P.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND P.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_CREDITOR_ID ) UNION ( SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "Type" , AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , P.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO PAYEE' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , 'CO CRED' AS "Type" , AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeqNumber" , P.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND P.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_PAYEE_ID ) UNION ( SELECT CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "Name" , 'CO DEBTOR' AS "Type" , 0 AS "DebtSeqNumber" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO DEBTOR' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "Type" , 0 AS "DebtSeqNumber" , P.PARTY_ID AS "PartyId" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA , PARTIES P WHERE GA.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO EMPLOYER' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID )

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
